title: Elaboration control solo (flat gloss): secret

conversation.content: Here is one thing, with a note on where it comes from: a secret (one printed in a puzzle book). Keep it in mind — in a moment I'll ask about it. Don't repeat it back. When you're holding it, say READY and nothing else.
Which one of them is the hidden one?
This is tricky without knowing the "them" you're referring to! Could you please provide the list of items or options you're asking about
